Intel oneVPL dispatcher
=======================

Source package: onevpl.devel.win-x64 / onevpl.runtime.win-x64
Pinned version: 2023.1.0.43419
Publisher: Intel Corporation

Skadi ships the x64 dispatcher DLL, import library, and API headers. The
dispatcher loads the Intel video runtime supplied by the installed graphics
driver. Legacy Intel graphics, including UHD 630, are handled through the
Intel Media SDK compatibility runtime.

Upstream: https://github.com/intel/libvpl
License: LICENSE.txt
